checks.description: Guardrail that out must never contain more than one high bit at any time.
checks.pass_condition: For every observed sample of out, the number of bits set to '1' is exactly one.
checks.trigger_condition: Continuously during the execution of any plan case.

checks.description: Verify that the output remains one-hot and rotates by one position on each observed clock edge after reset release.
checks.pass_condition: All sampled values of out are one-hot and successive samples differ by a single-bit left rotation (wrapping from MSB to LSB).
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan stimulus releases reset and observes at least three consecutive clock cycles.
